auth.loginDescription: Sign in with your email and password to access your study workspace.
auth.signupDescription: Create an MVP account with email and password. Social auth and onboarding can be added later.
auth.introTitle: Minimal auth foundation for the MVP.
auth.introDescription: Supabase Auth is connected for email and password flows. Lists, study logic, and the rest of the product can build on top of this session layer.
auth.accountCreated: Account created. Check your email to confirm your address, then log in.
auth.checkEmail: Check your email for the next step.
auth.resetSent: Password reset instructions were sent if the account exists.
auth.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email before signing in.
auth.userAlreadyRegistered: An account with this email already exists.
auth.tooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Please wait and try again.

lists.title: Lists
lists.overviewTitle: Keep vocabulary collections organized and ready for study.
lists.overviewDescription: Build and manage your own language lists. Data is now loaded from your database and scoped to your account.
lists.databaseScopeDescription: Lists below are now loaded from your database records.
lists.emptyDescription: Start with a small vocabulary set and build from there. Your study flow is ready as soon as the first list exists.
lists.formatDescriptionPrefix: Add one card per line using the format
lists.itemsHelp: Empty lines and invalid rows are ignored. Valid rows keep the entered order.
lists.ignoredLinesSuffix: will be ignored because they are empty or not in the expected format.
lists.itemsRequired: Add at least one valid item using the format front % back.
lists.createError: Unable to create the list right now. Please try again.
lists.updateError: Unable to save changes right now. Please try again.
lists.deleteDialogDescriptionSuffix: and all of its items will be permanently removed. This action cannot be undone.
lists.tempFailedDescription: This list stays temporary unless you save it.
lists.tempFailedMissingDescription: There is no temporary failed-items list in this session. Open it again from study results.
lists.tempFailedSaveError: Unable to save this temporary list right now. Please try again.

study.title: Study
study.emptyListWarning: This list has no items to study yet.
study.tapReadyInstruction: Tap the card when you are ready to check the answer.
study.recordAnswerPrompt: Reveal the card to record whether you got it right.
study.tempMissingDescription: This temporary study flow no longer has source data in the current browser session. Open the temporary list again and restart study.

results.title: Results
results.noResultsDescription: Start a new session from the setup page to generate results for this list.
results.completedDescription: You completed a focused flashcard review session.

ui.placeholderCard: UI-only placeholder. Inputs and submission flows are intentionally omitted.
ui.placeholderScreen: Placeholder-only route. Business logic, persistence, and form/session state have intentionally been left out.

errors.notFoundDescription: The page you requested does not exist or is no longer available.
